song.title: Blessing Honor and Glory Be Thine
song.lyrics: [V1] 1) Blessing and honor and glory be Thine, And glory be Thine, And glory be Thine. Blessing and honor and glory be Thine, Both now and evermore.|| Praise Him! Praise Him! All ye saints adore Him. Praise Him! Praise Him! Both now and evermore. Hallelujah!
song.author: Revelation 5:13
